objective: Evaluate whether the frozen OPEN_TRAIN structure-only surrogate predicts independently generated V4-H dual-receptor continuous docking geometry, with explicit separation of global parent-level signal and within-parent candidate ranking.
claim_boundary: Research-only evaluation of computational docking-geometry approximation. Not Docking Gold, binding probability, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, formal prospective validation, or final submission authority.

teacher_unseal_contract.allowed_label_source: one terminal immutable V4-H continuous-geometry teacher built after the adaptive docking campaign reaches a terminal state
teacher_unseal_contract.technical_incomplete_policy: exclude from numeric metrics, report IDs/counts/reasons separately, and do not impute

required_secondary_evaluations: per-parent Spearman for each parent with sufficient analyzable rows
macro mean and median per-parent Spearman
parent-centered Spearman after subtracting within-parent means from prediction and target
C0283 target distribution versus the other ten parents

research_interpretation_rules.global_good_within_parent_poor: surrogate may rank parent/scaffold geometry but is not accepted for within-parent sequence selection
research_interpretation_rules.global_and_within_parent_good: surrogate may be used as a research frontscreen before real docking, with portfolio constraints
research_interpretation_rules.global_and_within_parent_poor: do not deploy the surrogate for candidate screening
